message:
fix(render-svg): guard f32-to-i32 cast in attribute formatting

Add range and finiteness checks before casting f32 to i32 in SVG
attribute number formatting. Previously, NaN, Infinity, or values
outside i32 range would produce incorrect output via truncation:
- f32::NAN as i32 → 0 (silent data loss)
- f32::INFINITY as i32 → i32::MAX (2147483647)
- Values > 2^31 would wrap/saturate

Now falls through to the {:.2} format path for out-of-range values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
